items.name_cn:
Beige Large Monogram Clutch
No.: 2esca490yxl_h27e_tu
Product Info
This A5 clutch is an elegant and minimalist accessory. Crafted from beige and black extra-large Oblique print fabric, it reinterprets the brand's classic pattern with a Dior logo on the front and grained calfskin trim. The zip compartment features a phone slip pocket and four card slots. Can be carried in hand or placed inside a handbag.
Beige and black extra-large Oblique print fabric
Front with metal-plated brass Dior logo
Interior with embossed Dior logo
Metal-plated brass zipper
Internal slip pocket
4 card slots
Size Info
Dimensions: 26.5x17.5 cm (LxH)
Fits A5 and US letter size documents # Fabric

items.name_cn:
Beige·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A must-have bestseller that has conquered the entire fashion world upon release. Nostalgic Left Bank, inspired by the Rue De Solferino in Paris! The bag uses original factory patent leather cowhide, offering excellent texture and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top-half opening clasp completely redefines your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim in amazement—bags can actually open like this, it's simply too fun!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm

items.name_cn:
Bestseller Gate Saddle Bag
👜The bow🎀 is not just decoration, but the only opening for the flap. The bag features only one brass bullet buckle with a delicate brand logo, no other hardware. It embodies high-end Western European traditional leather craftsmanship and design style. So it is lightweight, and the strap is adjustable in length, suitable for any height. This is very nice💃💃
👉Small Size:20*19*11.5cm. The body is very flexible calfskin with two compartments and a card slot. Fits a short wallet, phone, lipstick💄, compact, etc. The capacity is very impressive😇. You can even bring a Kindle😍😍10183#(Plain: Caramel/White)😘 Comes with box
